title: ValidationResult
description: The Validator's verdict on a completed patch application. Captures whether the inserted vulnerability is structurally well-formed, semantically plausible, and non-trivial. This is a deterministic, rule-based output — no LLM is involved.

result_id.description: Identifier for this validation result, derived deterministically from run_id.

plan_id.description: plan_id from the PatchPlan that was validated.

overall.description: Aggregate verdict. PASS = all enabled checks passed. FAIL = at least one enabled check failed. SKIP = no checks were enabled.

checks.description: Individual check results. One entry per enabled check.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation. Required when status is 'fail' or 'error'.

target_id.description: If this check is scoped to a specific target, its target_id from the PatchPlan.

detail.description: Check-specific structured detail (e.g. line numbers for syntax errors).

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when validation completed.

notes.description: Free-text notes for human reviewers or downstream tools.
